name: Cross the Road

notes.en: Tap the road (or the forward button) to hop one lane ahead; swipe or tap left/right to dodge within a lane. Arrow keys / WASD work too — Up hops, Left/Right dodge.
notes.ru: Тапни по дороге (или по кнопке вперёд), чтобы прыгнуть на одну полосу вперёд; свайп или тап влево/вправо — увернуться в полосе. Стрелки / WASD тоже работают: вверх — прыжок, влево/вправо — уворот.

notes: Pseudo-3D 'cross the road' arcade game: lanes recede toward a horizon (trapezoidal perspective, sprites scaled by distance) instead of a flat top-down grid. Classic hop-forward/dodge-left-right control scheme. Each stage is a fixed run of traffic lanes ending in a safe median; clearing a stage grows the lane count (up to a cap) and, without a cap, keeps raising vehicle speed and packing lanes denser — a real, endless difficulty ramp, not a token bump. Row generation is a pure function of stage number (stageParams() in road.js), so difficulty at any stage can be inspected or jumped to directly for testing. No bundled image or audio assets — road, traffic, and the runner are canvas vector shapes with a neon glow; sound reuses games/_shared/js/ogh-sfx.js (extended here with 'hop'/'honk' patterns, same convention as games/neon-drift's 'screech' and games/penguin-fling's 'thwack'/'boing'/'whoosh'/'land'). Best distance persists via OGHProfile, same convention as games/pop-the-bugs.
